title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: AI bots now outnumber humans in web requests, Google AI Overviews reduce user clicks on links, and AI agents are beginning to browse and transact online. The video argues this represents a fundamental shift in how the internet is used, with machines increasingly mediating human access to web content.
writeup: The video examines a shift in web traffic toward machines: AI bots now account for more web requests than humans, Google AI Overviews cut clicks through to source links, and AI agents are starting to browse and transact online. It frames these trends as a structural change in how the internet operates, with software increasingly sitting between people and web content. The core takeaways: automated traffic is displacing human visits, summary layers reduce direct engagement with original pages, and agent-driven activity points to machines mediating access and transactions.
